name: distortionz_metrics
changelog: v1.0.1 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, tick API reference, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.0.0 — Initial release. Premium developer dashboard for the distortionz_* stack. Three tabs: Resources, Server, Ticks. Tier-gated via distortionz_perms. Default keybind F4 + /metrics command.
